name: On Boot
description: An automation to perform when the node starts. See [`on_boot`](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#esphome-on_boot).

config_entries.label: Priority
config_entries.description: The priority to execute your custom initialization code. A higher value means a high priority and thus also your code being executed earlier. Please note this is an ESPHome-internal value and any change will not be marked as a breaking change. Defaults to `600`. Priorities (you can use any value between them too):
